heading: Applicability to Canal Zone
label: 858 Applicability to Canal Zone
text: This subchapter applies to and within the Canal Zone.
notes: References in TextFor definition of Canal Zone, referred to in text, see , Foreign Relations and Intercourse.section 3602(b) of Title 22
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Internal Security Act of 1950 which comprises subchapters I to III of this chapter.
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1962 Amendment note under , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.Jan. 2, 1963section 25 of Pub. L. 87–845section 414 of Title 28
